creator: raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it
text:
Hi,
 that's ok, now i will send my issue to dante-bugs@inet.
 The same issue afflict the NEC Socks5 Socks Server.
 
 Regards
 
 Raffaele
 
 -----Messaggio originale-----
 Da: Anders Nordby [mailto:anders@FreeBSD.org]=20
 Inviato: luned=EC 4 giugno 2007 22.56
 A: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it
 Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org; Mark Linimon
 Oggetto: Re: ports/112648: net/dante: & net/socks5: Buffer Overflow in =
 some
 SOCKS Server
 
 Hi,
 
 Dante developers believe there is no such overflow, and I don't see how =
 your
 email shows there is one. If you really think there is an issue, maybe =
 you
 should report it to dante-bugs@inet.no.
 
 Bye,
 
 --
 Anders.
